code: export class ItemOfferPopupParser{constructor(){this._senderId=0;this._senderName='';this._itemName='';this._itemIcon='';}flush(){this._senderId=0;this._senderName='';this._itemName='';this._itemIcon='';return true;}parse(wrapper){this._senderId=wrapper.readInt();this._senderName=wrapper.readString();this._itemName=wrapper.readString();this._itemIcon=wrapper.readString();return true;}get senderId(){return this._senderId;}get senderName(){return this._senderName;}get itemName(){return this._itemName;}get itemIcon(){return this._itemIcon;}}
